configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.description: mcpzip is configured via a JSON file at ~/.config/compressed-mcp-proxy/config.json.

contributing.title: Contributing
contributing.description: Contributions are welcome! Here's how to get started.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: mcpzip is an MCP proxy that aggregates multiple upstream MCP servers and exposes them through a Search + Execute pattern. Instead of loading hundreds of tool schemas into your AI's context window, mcpzip gives the model just 3 meta-tools to discover and invoke any tool on demand.

search.title: Search
search.description: mcpzip uses a two-tier search system to find relevant tools from your catalog.

transports.title: Transports
transports.description: mcpzip supports three transport types for connecting to upstream MCP servers.
